description: The PreToolUse no-dash guard denies a Write/Edit/NotebookEdit payload that contains an em-dash or en-dash, and allows clean or unreadable payloads.

cases.given: a Write tool call whose content contains an em-dash (U+2014)
cases.expect: the hook emits a PreToolUse deny decision whose reason names the banned character and the ' - ' substitution

cases.given: an Edit tool call whose new_string contains an en-dash (U+2013)
cases.expect: the hook emits a PreToolUse deny decision

cases.given: an Edit tool call whose new_string is free of em-dash and en-dash characters
cases.expect: the hook produces no deny output and exits 0 (the call proceeds)
the hook allows the call rather than blocking on a hook bug (exit 0, no deny)
